title: astragalus casei
intro: Astragalus casei, also known as Hedysarum, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Chinese medicine, where it is believed to tonify the Qi and enhance the immune system. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidative, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus casei can be prepared into various herbal products, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to boost energy, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of infections.
